item.description: Splitting, closing, and resizing viewport panes is now smoother and faster, with animated transitions and more precise divider dragging.

New Features

  • Materials toggle — a new per-viewport View menu option renders the model as plain matte white, as if it had no materials, useful for focusing on a model's shape rather than its color.

Improvements

  • Smooth shading and edge visibility are now set per viewport, so each pane in a split view can use its own shading and edge style.
  • Dark parts are now more visible, keeping highlights and legible edges instead of reading as flat silhouettes.
  • Multi-part slices are now named after the parts they contain, making it clear in your slicer which parts each file holds.
  • Various user interface refinements.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed smooth shading darkening flat faces near shallow bevels.
  • Fixed a trackpad roll gesture being interrupted by stray zoom events.

This release contains a ton of new features and improvements!

New Features

  • Cross-sections — slice the model with interactive cut planes to inspect its interior. Add multiple planes and move, rotate, and toggle each independently, with axis snapping and a gizmo that stays reachable as you navigate. Cross-sections are undoable, and persist across reloads.
  • Split View — split the model view into multiple independent panes, each with its own camera, cross-sections and view options.
  • Sidebar — a window sidebar replaces the parts popover, listing the model's measurements and parts with thumbnails and visibility toggles.
  • Slicing — send the whole model or individual parts to a preferred external slicer, optionally leaving out non-solid (context/visual) parts.

Improvements

  • Improved mouse interaction.
  • Optional crease-aware smooth shading.
  • Part highlighting now uses a clean outline.
  • Apparent zoom is better preserved when switching between perspective and orthographic.
  • Measurement display and interaction are significantly more efficient.
  • The info sheet now reports dimensions, volume, surface area, and part count.
  • Improved grid: it now follows the camera as you pan and zoom instead of staying a fixed patch, fades smoothly at its edge, and shows a live scale readout that updates as you zoom.
SpaceMouse
  • New activation mode: claim the SpaceMouse in all apps except a listed set, alongside the existing "only these apps" mode.
  • Improved compatibility.
  • Smoother navigation.
  • The cursor is now hidden while navigating.

• New measurement tool for measuring distances and coordinates directly on a model, with corner snapping, axis constraints, and undo
  • Smoother navigation when using a 3D mouse (SpaceMouse)
  • Models now open without freezing the interface while loading
  • Fixed the parts list appearance in light mode
Adds Quick Look support for 3MF files: full preview and thumbnails in Finder, with click-to-orbit navigation.
This release fixes a bug where a model would not be automatically reloaded if the filename contained spaces.

• Support for the 3MF production extension
  • Better model loading performance
  • Improved highlighting of parts
This version of Cadova Viewer is required for full compatibility with 3MF files generated by Cadova 0.2.
